reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
랍스터가 진짜 커서 터그 놀이 하기 진짜 딱 좋아요.
사진에도 보시다시피;.. 미친갱얼쥐가 됩니다
장난감에 뒤집힌 눈까리...주인도 못알아보는 듯 해여
랍스터 꼬리 부분 사이에 간식을 넣어 노즈워크로도 사용할 수 있어 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: The lobster is really big, so it's perfect for tug of war games. As you can see in the pictures... my dog goes absolutely crazy 😂 With those flipped-out eyes when playing with the toy... even the owner becomes unrecognizable lol. Plus, you can stuff treats in the lobster's tail section and use it for nose work too, which is great!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 크기도 크고 퀄리티도 너무 좋아요 일반 인형에서 나는 삑삑소리보다 더 우렁차고 ㅎㅎ강아지가 좋아해여
reviews.content_en: The size is big and the quality is amazing too! The squeaker sound is much louder than those in regular plush toys hehe, and my dog loves it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 친구 강아지한테 선물했는데 너무너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 으르렁 거리면서 안뻬앗길라고 하네요^^;; 중대형견들에게 딱 좋은 장난감으로 추천합니다! 몸통 전체에 큰 삑삑이가 있어서 개가 환장하더라고요.. 주인은 좀 시끄럽겠지만 개는 정말 즐거워했어요!
reviews.content_en: I got it as a gift for a friend's dog and they absolutely love it lol lol love it so much they growl and won't let go of it^^;; I highly recommend this toy for medium to large dogs! There's a big squeaker on the entire body, so the dog goes crazy for it.. It might be a bit loud for the owner, but the dog had such a great time!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
강아지 최애 장난감이에요!!
랍스타가 사주고 진짜 너무 너무 좋아해서 바로 행복 강쥐 모먼트..!! 저걸로 놀아주면 진짜 끝도 없이 계속 놀자고 랍스타를 가지고 오더라구요 ㅎㅎ 
혼자 있을 때도 랍스타만 가지고 놀고 
두개 사줬는데 하나는 이미 터지고 삑삑이까지 작살내버렸어요 삑삑이 장난감 좋아하는 강쥐들 무조건 강추!!
reviews.content_en: It's my dog's favorite toy!! Ever since I got the lobster, they absolutely love it and immediately became a happy puppy moment..!! When I play with it, they endlessly keep bringing the lobster back for more lol. Even when alone, they just play with the lobster. I bought two of them, and one is already torn up with the squeaker completely destroyed lol If you have a dog that loves squeaky toys, this is a must-buy!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅜㅜ 생각한거보다 크긴한데 우리 강아지가 넘 좋아해요
장난감 보통 며칠 가지고 놀면 뜯어지는데 이건 엄청 튼튼합니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅠㅜㅜ It's bigger than I thought, but my dog absolutely loves it! Toys usually get torn apart after playing with them for a few days, but this one is super durable hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
왕삑삑이가 있고 양쪽 집게에도 삑삑이라 너무 좋아요
엄청 열심히 갖고놀다가 베고 자네요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It has a big squeaker and squeakers on both claws too, so I love it! My dog plays with it so enthusiastically and then falls asleep biting it lol

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 토토가 정말 좋아해요! 삑삑 소리도 크고 우렁찬 ㅎㅎ 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서ㅜ너무 좋아요오
reviews.content_en: Toto really loves it! The squeaker sound is loud and powerful hehe My dog plays with it so well, I'm so happy about it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 구매하려고했더니 품절 떴는데 고객센터에물어보니 재고있어서 바로구매했어요 집에재작년에사드린거있는데 새거보더니 또사달라길래 가격차이보고 온라인으로구매했어요 샘플간식 절반만드시고 안드세요ㅎ감사합니다
reviews.content_en: I was going to buy it but it showed out of stock, so I called customer service and they had inventory, so I bought it right away. We had one we bought a couple years ago at home, and when my dog saw the new one, they asked for another, so I checked the price difference and bought it online. My dog only ate half of the sample treats hehe Thank you!

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 아는 언니가 이거 삑삑이 소리가 뱃고동 소리라고 해서 사봤어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 진짜 웅장하네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 시끄러운 공삑삑이 소리가 아니라 진짜 웅장해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: A friend told me this toy's squeaker sounds like a ship's horn, so I tried it lol lol It's really grand!! lol lol It's not a loud ball squeaker sound but genuinely majestic lol lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
4랍스타..
벌써 집에 랍스타가 4개 거쳐갔습니다.
강쥐가 미친듯이 좋아해요 
이빨이 날카로워서 자꾸 솜을 빼길래 이제는 놀이시간에만 꺼내줍니다 ㅋㅋ
대형 삑삑이 소리가 강쥐 도파민을 싹 돌게해서 랍스타만 꺼내들면 난리쳐요 내놓으라고
삑삑이 장난감 좋아하는 강쥐 친구들이라면 집에 랍스타 한마리 데리고 오세요 좋아 날뜁니다
reviews.content_en: 4 lobsters.. I've already gone through 4 lobsters at home. My dog loves it like crazy. Because their teeth are sharp, they keep pulling out the stuffing, so now I only take it out during playtime lol The big squeaker sound gets my dog's dopamine going crazy, so whenever I pull out the lobster, they go nuts demanding I give it back. If you have a dog friend who loves squeaky toys, bring home a lobster! They'll go absolutely wild for it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 소리도크고 크기도크고 좋아하세요 워낙장난감을좋아해서요
reviews.content_en: The sound is loud and the size is big, and he loves it! He's really into toys.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 탄탄하고 예뻐요. 우리 강아지가 한참 가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so sturdy and cute. My pup plays with it all the time.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
생일선물로 식기,간식,인형까지 ~~
체구가 작은데도 .. ㅠ
인형크기나 사이즈가  넘 적당하고 좋아,
물고 뜯고 넘 넘 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
Got it as a birthday gift with food bowls, treats, and a plush toy too ~~
Even though he's small... ㅠ
The plush size and overall size are just right and so good,
He loves chewing and biting it so much ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 교환처리 신속히 해주셔서 잘가지고놀고있어요 만족
reviews.content_en: They processed the exchange quickly and he's playing with it well. Very satisfied

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 생각보다 크고 귀여워요 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's bigger and cuter than I expected. My dog plays with it well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 저희 강쥐가 큰 인형 장난감을 좋아해서 큰거큰거 위주로 찾다가 구매했어요. 인형 자체 비주얼이 귀여운건 아니지만🥲 다리가 여러개 달려있어서 가지고 놀기에 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: My pup loves big plush toys so I was looking for bigger ones. The toy itself isn't the cutest looking 🥲 but it has multiple legs so he loves playing with it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아기 강아지인 저희 강아지에겐 크기가 좀 큰가 했는데 지 몸만한걸 끌고 다니면서 잘 가지고 놀아요 ! 가는 실을 왜이렇게 좋아하는지 더듬이는 며칠만에 뜯어먹었네용
reviews.content_en: I thought the size might be too big for my puppy, but he drags around something almost as big as him and plays with it great! Not sure why he loves the thin string so much though - he chewed off the antenna in just a few days lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아주 잘가져 놀아요~ 다음에 주려고 딴데 올려났는데 몰래 올라가서 들고와 혼자서 비닐뜯어버리네요 ㅠㅠ 담부터 포장비닐 뜯어놔둬야겠어요...
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so well~ I was planning to save it for next time and hid it elsewhere, but he snuck up, grabbed it and tore open the plastic wrapping by himself ㅠㅠ Next time I'll have to open the packaging beforehand...

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고놀아요~ 바잇미 대왕노란오리 인형도 엄청 잘가지고놀아서 이번엔 랍스타로 사줘봤는데 역시 너무좋아하네요!!
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so well~ He absolutely loved the BITE ME Big Yellow Duck toy too, so I got him the lobster this time and he loves it just as much!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
빠른배송 감사합니다.
바로 줬더니 너무 잘 갖고 노네요 ㅎㅎ 더듬이 두쪽 다 끊어졌지만 소리도 크고 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
Thank you for the fast shipping.
I gave it to him right away and he plays with it so well ㅎㅎ Both antennae got torn off but the sound is loud and he loves it

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 기존에. 쓰던 제품인데 다 물어 뜯어놔서. 재구매 헀어요~~~
reviews.content_en: It's a product I've been using before, but my pup chewed it up completely, so I'm buying it again~~~

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 저희애가 너무 좋아해서 두번째 구매에요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My fur baby loves it so much, this is my second purchase! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 우리 강아지들이 너무 좋아해서 행복해요..
reviews.content_en: Our doggies love it so much, I'm so happy..

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
큼직하니 소리도 크고 좋아요
집게발은 소리가 너무 작아요
베개로도 사용해요
reviews.content_en: It's nice and big with a loud squeaker sound 🎵 The claw part has a squeaker that's too quiet though. We also use it as a pillow!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 퀄리티 좋아요! 장난감은 바잇미가 참 잘만드는거같아요
reviews.content_en: Great quality! BITE ME really makes great toys 😊

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀고 택배도 빨랐어요~ 삑삑이 굿
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it well and the delivery was super fast~ Love the squeaker! 🐕

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 소리가 뱃고동 소리가 나요. 몸통을 눌러야 그소리가 나는데, 우리 애들은 집게나 꼬리만 물고 터그놀이 합니다.
reviews.content_en: The squeaker sounds like a ship horn. You have to press the body for that sound, but my dogs just grab the claws or tail and play tug-of-war.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 화개장터에서 눈여겨 보던 가재 인형 집 오자마자 주문 했어요 :) 튼튼해 보여서 기대 됩니다! 트릿 포켓도 있어서 다양하게 이용할 수 있을거 같아요! 아이한테 아직 주기 전이지만 곧잘 갖고 놀거 같습니다
reviews.content_en: I spotted this crawfish toy at Hwagae Market and ordered it right away when it arrived home :) It looks really durable so I'm excited! It even has a treat pocket so we can use it in lots of different ways! I haven't given it to my pup yet, but I think they'll love playing with it soon

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 잘 받아서 잘 사용하겠습니다.
reviews.content_en: Received it well and will use it happily.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
지인 멈무네 선물로 갈 장난감입니다
오래 가지고 놀면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: This is a toy as a gift for a friend's pup. I hope they play with it for a long time! 🎁

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감은 파스텔톤에 부드럽고,  울강아지가 항상  옆에 놓고 자는 애장품인듯 하네요~
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME toy has such a soft pastel tone, and it seems like our pup's favorite item that he always keeps by his side to sleep with~ 🐕

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 오리 써보고 너무 좋아서 구매합니다 가격착하고 대형견에게 딱
reviews.content_en: I tried the duck and loved it so much that I'm buying it again. Great price and perfect for large dogs!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감 크기도 크고 뽁뽁이 소리도 잘나서 아주 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The toy size is nice and big, and the bubble popping sound comes through really well, so it's awesome 👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요~하루 종일 물고 다니네요~몸통에서만 소리가 나는줄 알았는데 집게발에도 삑삑이가 있네요~집게발에서도 소리가나요~~
reviews.content_en: He loves it so much~he carries it around all day~I thought the sound only came from the body, but there's also a squeaker in the claw feet~so it makes sounds from the claws too~~ 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 랍스터 장난감 잘 산거같아요 너무 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: I think the lobster toy was a great purchase, and he loves it so much 🦞

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
집에 있는데 댱이칭구 선물로 구매했답니다~
삑삑이소리도 우렁찹니다
reviews.content_en: I had it at home and bought it as a gift for my friend's dog~ The squeaker sound is really loud and clear 🎵

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아이들이 좋아해서 기분이 좋네요~^^
reviews.content_en: The kids love it so I'm in a good mood~^^ 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 우리집 강아지가 별로 안좋아함
reviews.content_en: Our dog doesn't really like it that much
